title: I'm Too Fond of My Fur!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo braves the freezing Himalayas to help his friend Professor von Volt and meets a hidden family of gentle yetis! 🐱

q.en: Why did Geronimo order the Miracle Lotion Helmet from a TV commercial?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为什么会按照电视广告订购那款神奇生发头盔？

options.en: He needed it for his climb up Mouse Everest.
options.zh: 他攀登老鼠珠峰时需要它。

options.en: Thea told him he had to buy it.
He wanted to become a professional bowler rat.
options.zh: 他想成为一名专业的保龄球鼠。

options.en: A TV ad made him worry his fur was thinning, so he wanted thicker fur.
options.zh: 电视广告让他担心自己的毛在变少，所以他想让毛更浓密。

explain.en: A blonde-furred mouse on TV scared Geronimo into thinking he had a bald spot, so he ordered the helmet and lotion to grow thicker fur.
explain.zh: 电视里一只金毛母鼠吓唬杰罗尼摩，让他以为自己长了秃斑，于是他订购头盔和药水，想让毛长得更浓密。

q.en: Who called Geronimo on the phone asking for his help?
q.zh: 是谁打电话给杰罗尼摩向他求助的？

options.en: His cousin Trap
His sister Thea
Professor Paws von Volt, a brilliant scientist and old friend.
options.zh: 波兹·冯·沃尔特教授，一位聪明的科学家，也是他的老朋友。

options.en: The curly-furred delivery mouse

explain.en: Professor von Volt, a brilliant scientist and dear old friend, called from his secret lab and said his life was in danger.
explain.zh: 沃尔特教授是一位聪明的科学家，也是杰罗尼摩亲爱的老朋友，他从秘密实验室打来电话，说自己的生命有危险。

q.en: Where did Professor von Volt say he was calling from?
q.zh: 沃尔特教授说他自己是从哪里打来电话的？

options.en: The office of The Rodent's Gazette
A desert island in the Ratlantic Ocean
Geronimo's house on Mouseford Lane
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩在老鼠福德巷的家

options.en: His secret laboratory in the Himalayas
options.zh: 他在喜马拉雅山脉的秘密实验室

explain.en: The professor said, 'I'm calling from my secret lab in the Himalayas,' and asked Geronimo to fetch his diary.
explain.zh: 教授说：我是从喜马拉雅山脉的秘密实验室打来的电话，并请杰罗尼摩去取他的日记。

options.en: A delivery mouse with thick curly fur
options.zh: 一只长着浓密卷毛的送货鼠

options.en: Their Sherpa guide who helped them climb the mountain
options.zh: 他们的夏尔巴向导，帮助他们登山

options.en: The editor of The Daily Rat
A taxi driver in New Mouse City
options.zh: 新鼠城的一名出租车司机

explain.en: A rodent with honey-colored fur and a black ponytail met them in Kathmandu and introduced himself as Ratfur, their Sherpa guide.
explain.zh: 一只蜜色皮毛、扎着黑色马尾的鼠在加德满都迎接他们，自我介绍说是他们的夏尔巴向导拉特弗。

q.en: What tall mountain did the family have to climb to find the professor?
q.zh: 为了找到教授，这一家人不得不攀登哪座高山？

options.en: Purrfect Park
Mouse Everest, also called Chomolungma
options.zh: 老鼠珠峰，也叫珠穆朗玛

options.en: The Twisted Tail Gate Bridge
Cheese Mart hill

explain.en: Ratfur said the professor had gone to Chomolungma, the 'Mother of the World' — which Geronimo knew as Mouse Everest, the highest mountain.
explain.zh: 拉特弗说教授去了珠穆朗玛，也就是众山圣母，而杰罗尼摩知道那就是世界上最高的老鼠珠峰。

q.en: What did Geronimo find in the snow when he was alone on the mountain?
q.zh: 当杰罗尼摩独自在山上时，他在雪地里发现了什么？

options.en: An unidentified flying cheese slice
A gigantic pawprint that he believed belonged to a yeti
options.zh: 一个巨大的脚印，他相信那是雪人留下的

options.en: Professor von Volt's missing glasses
options.zh: 沃尔特教授丢失的眼镜

options.en: A lost wallet full of money

explain.en: After dropping behind the group, Geronimo spotted a gigantic pawprint in the snow and was sure it was the yeti's.
explain.zh: 落在队伍后面后，杰罗尼摩在雪地里看到一个巨大的脚印，并确信那是雪人留下的。

q.en: Who picked Geronimo up by his tail and carried him into a dark cave?
q.zh: 是谁揪住杰罗尼摩的尾巴把他拎起来，带进了一个黑暗的洞穴？

options.en: His nephew Benjamin
The big father yeti
His cousin Trap
The Sherpa guide Ratfur

explain.en: The huge father yeti lifted Geronimo by his tail and carried him into the cave, where Geronimo then found the professor.
explain.zh: 高大的雪人爸爸揪住杰罗尼摩的尾巴把他拎进洞穴，杰罗尼摩随后在洞里找到了教授。

q.en: What was wrong with the baby yeti?

options.en: He was lost in the snowstorm
He wanted to read a book
He was going bald
He was very ill and needed special herbal medicine
options.zh: 他病得很重，需要特殊的草药医治

explain.en: The cub was covered in red dots and very sick; the professor was feeding him herbal medicine to try to cure him.
explain.zh: 小雪人身上布满红点，病得很重，教授正用草药喂他，想办法治好他。

q.en: What did Professor von Volt need Geronimo to bring him?
q.zh: 沃尔特教授需要杰罗尼摩给他带来什么？

options.en: His secret diary containing a special healing formula
options.zh: 他的秘密日记，里面写着一种特殊的治病配方

options.en: A bottle of Miracle Lotion
The massaging helmet
A digital camera

explain.en: The professor told Geronimo to find his secret diary, which held a special formula strong enough to cure the sick cub.
explain.zh: 教授让杰罗尼摩去找他的秘密日记，里面有一种特殊配方，足够强大到能治好生病的小雪人。

q.en: Why did Geronimo promise not to tell anyone about the yetis?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为什么答应不把雪人的事告诉任何人？

options.en: Because Trap dared him to stay quiet
options.zh: 因为特拉普激他将这事憋在心里

options.en: Because the yetis were dangerous meat-eating beasts
options.zh: 因为雪人是危险的食肉猛兽

options.en: Because Thea wanted the scoop for her paper
options.zh: 因为蒂奥想抢先报道这个独家新闻

options.en: Because yetis are shy creatures and the professor asked him to keep it a secret
options.zh: 因为雪人是害羞的动物，而且教授请求他保守秘密

explain.en: The professor explained yetis are extremely shy and would be upset by nosy journalists, so Geronimo gave his word of honor to stay silent.
explain.zh: 教授解释雪人非常害羞，会被爱窥探的记者吓坏，于是杰罗尼摩以鼠的名誉起誓，保守这个秘密。
